tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List Kamy's public system PDF templates. No authentication required.

tools.name: get_template_schema
tools.description: Fetch the JSON Schema (exact data shape) and a copy-pasteable sample payload for a Kamy system template by slug. Call this before render_pdf so you fill the right fields with the right types instead of guessing. No authentication required.

tools.name: render_pdf
tools.description: Render a PDF from a Kamy template and data when a Kamy API key is configured. Without a key, returns dashboard setup instructions.

tools.name: validate_payload
tools.description: Dry-run a render payload against a template's schema WITHOUT producing a PDF or using quota. Returns per-field self-healing errors (expected type, value received, allowed values, an example) so you can fix the data before render_pdf. Requires a Kamy API key.

tools.name: extract_document
tools.description: Extract structured data from a PDF (invoice, receipt, contract, ID document, or any form). Returns the parsed JSON plus a public verify URL that proves the extraction matches the source. Use this when an agent needs to read an inbound document and act on it.

tools.name: ask_kamy
tools.description: Ask Kamy Brain a question about Kamy usage, templates, plans, or errors. Sends the question to Kamy's public assistant endpoint and returns a paragraph answer.

tools.name: install_sdk
tools.description: Get install commands and setup code for @kamydev/sdk in your framework.

tools.name: generate_integration_code
tools.description: Generate copy-paste integration code for a specific Kamy template and framework.

tools.name: create_signature_request
tools.description: Send a previously rendered PDF to a signer for e-signature when a Kamy API key is configured. Without a key, returns dashboard setup instructions.

tools.name: list_signature_requests
tools.description: List signature requests created by the configured Kamy account, newest first. Without a key, returns dashboard setup instructions.

tools.name: get_signature_certificate
tools.description: Returns the authenticated download URL for a signature request's Certificate of Completion PDF — the process audit trail (invite → opened → consent → signed, with IP / user-agent) that legal teams expect. Only available after the request reaches a terminal state. Without a key, returns dashboard set

tools.name: pki_sign_pdf
tools.description: Cryptographically sign an existing render with PAdES when a Kamy API key is configured. Without a key, returns dashboard setup instructions.

tools.name: verify_pdf_signature
tools.description: Compute the kamy.dev/verify URL for a PDF without making a Kamy API call. Pass the PDF as base64; the MCP Worker hashes it in-memory and does not store or forward it.

tools.name: get_api_key_instructions
tools.description: Return step-by-step instructions for creating a Kamy API key in the dashboard. Does not open the browser.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: extract_document, get_signature_certificate · Private data: render_pdf, validate_payload, extract_document, create_signature_request, pki_sign_pdf, get_api_key_instructions · Public sink: create_signature_request, verify_pdf_signature · Destructive: validate_payload.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: extract_document, get_signature_certificate · Private data: render_pdf, validate_payload, extract_document, create_signature_request, pki_sign_pdf, get_api_key_instructions · Public sink: create_signature_request, verify_pdf_signature · Destructive: validate_payload

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
